case_title: ROBERT BARNES ASSOCIATES VS HAHN WOLFGANG F ESQ LAW OFFICE OF WOLFGANG HAHN

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HAHN WOLFGANG F ESQ LAW OFFICE OF WOLFGANG HAHN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,365.50 FILED BY ROBERT BARNES ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT HAHN WOLFGANG F ESQ LAW OFFICE OF WOLFGANG HAHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
